qualifier: third intra-day run · supersedes evening artifact · ledger ops are incremental against canonical state

paragraphs: BTC bled another $700 to $74,665, -3.36% on the day and -4.69% on the week. Total mcap shed a further $20B to $2.58T, breadth pinned at 3/20 green where the only non-stablecoin is Canton at +0.28%. F&G held 28 Fear for the second consecutive read. SOL leads the decline at -5.99% 24h, deeper than majors — the alt tail continues to pay for the leverage tail thinning.

Perps tape MIXED on a single fresh regime fire. BSB flipped DISTRIBUTION → MOMENTUM in the 09:57Z prefetch as funding cooled to +0.047%/8h (under the +0.08% gate that fired this morning) and pct_24h re-accelerated to +41.64% on OI +48.48% 24h — the leverage stack is still building, not rolling. The BSB SHORT watchlist still holds because the trigger condition (funding push back through +0.08% on a flat-to-red day) pertains to tomorrow's read from a MOMENTUM base rather than DIST. BCH joins watchlist on the heaviest smart-money exit in today's universe — top L/S 1.18 down 1.44 over 7 days with pct_4h -4.80%, one more -5% day fires CAPITULATION on the Tier 2 -10% drawdown gate. EDEN sits one tick from re-arming CAPITULATION but funding flipped positive during the flush, blocking the regime for now. Three current positions all hold above invalidations into the cascade.

AIXBT grounding finally refreshed for the first time today — Warsh confirmed as incoming Fed Chair is the load-bearing addition. His regime-shift signals lock in rate-cut deferral against sticky inflation and Hormuz supply pressure. That is the structural bridge under the BTC flush printing the same hour the Dow closes a record 50,579: equity longs price earnings and buybacks, crypto longs priced rate relief that arrives slower. RWA expansion accelerates through the fear-28 regime as the grounding adds Centrifuge, Canton, Sui gas-free stablecoins, and SOL ETF inflows. Institutional tokenized rails are decoupling from the BTC tape — capital pools separate, not the same money rotating.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · risk-off into Fear day two with Warsh as the bridge to deferred rate relief, three current longs/short ride their invalidations, watchlist building shorts (BSB/BEAT/GENIUS/BCH) into the bleed, no new entries fired.

current_positions.thesis_note: NEAR closed yesterday at $2.058 and today's tape tracks fractionally higher at $2.074, still above the $2.05 invalidation. AI agents and DePIN both rated 5/5 RIDE in narrative-tracker. Today's OI -3.99% 24h means another layer of late longs unwound without panic.
current_positions.watch: $2.05 is the line. Funding repaired to +0.0089%/8h above the 7d average — fresh longs paying premium back into the consolidation. A close below $2.05 closes the position; a hold above with OI rebuilding above $600M re-engages ACCUMULATION on tomorrow's scan.

current_positions.thesis_note: HYPE printed +1.56% to $55.482, holding above the revised $54 buyback-anchored floor. Hyperliquid stays PEAK 4/5 in narrative-tracker. Fresh AIXBT grounding shifts the HYPE narrative from $1.8M daily buybacks to HIP-4 prediction markets going live on Hyperliquid — institutional adoption story extending past protocol mechanics. Funding warmed to +0.0082%/8h above 7d average +0.0009%.
current_positions.invalidation: close below $54 (revised — original $56 breached, three-feed confluence holds through the breach)
current_positions.watch: $54 is the floor. Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.34 with +0.13 over 7 days holds smart money net long. A second close below $54 with the smart-money delta flipping back negative closes the position. Holding the $54-56 band with HIP-4 launch persisting re-firms the multi-week thesis.

current_positions.thesis_note: ZEC bounced +1.97% intraday to $594.07 but holds well below the $620 invalidation. Privacy/ZK still FADE day five in narrative-tracker, no fresh project-side catalyst. AIXBT grounding still names ZEC alone in privacy-coin strength (XMR dropped from the lead in the 09:00 UTC refresh). The narrative leg is intact and idiosyncratic — confirms ZEC carried the run, not the sector.
current_positions.watch: Funding flipped to +0.0072%/8h with the 7d average still negative at -0.0041% — longs paying premium into the bounce, classic trap shape. A bounce to the $605-610 zone is the operator's chance to scale in. Top-trader L/S at 0.78 still net short — trade partially priced. A clean reclaim above $620 with funding holding positive closes the short.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clean through 52% with OI continuing to build OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $250 (revised — original $275 breached but Decentralized compute promoted Peak to Rising same session)
watchlist.thesis: Narrative-tracker promoted Decentralized compute from Peak to Rising this morning on the architectural-disruptor angle (Etched, Cerebras, Tenstorrent). TAO holds at $260 on range 16.35% with OI -6.52% 24h on a flat 7d build. Funding +0.0033%/8h sits at the 7d average — leverage is patient, not aggressive. Setup forming, trigger has not fired.

watchlist.trigger: first flat-or-red 24h with funding pushing back through +0.08%/8h confirms DISTRIBUTION (currently MOMENTUM base, funding cooled to +0.047%/8h — needs re-extension)
watchlist.thesis: Regime flipped from DISTRIBUTION (morning prefetch) to MOMENTUM (09:57Z prefetch) as funding cooled below the +0.08%/8h gate and pct_24h re-accelerated to +41.64% on OI +48.48% 24h. The smart-money fingerprint still prints — top L/S 1.91 down 0.60 over 7 days reads as smart money exiting into retail leverage, the leverage stack still building rather than rolling. Token-movers tags it [BREAKOUT][PUMP-RISK] microcap on vol/mcap 0.16.

watchlist.trigger: funding crosses +0.08%/8h with another red day OR pct_4h returns sub -5% with OI holding flat
watchlist.thesis: BEAT bounced +1.52% today on volume 2.87x the 7d average — first reading clear of the 2.0 CATALYST-BREAKOUT floor in the watch bucket. Liquidations $1.88M still print past the 7d p75 of $1.06M, so the bounce reads as distribution into demand rather than fresh demand. Top-trader L/S 1.33 down 0.62 over 7 days holds the smart-money distribution-into-retail-leverage read. Funding warmed to +0.0189%/8h above 7d average +0.0095%.

watchlist.trigger: second-day red with OI extending lower fires CAPITULATION-shaped flow OR funding cross +0.08%/8h with continued red
watchlist.thesis: GENIUS printed -6.82% today on OI -5.35% 24h — early signs of the late-longs unwind. Funding cooled to +0.0008%/8h from the 7d average +0.0073%, so the leverage stack no longer pays premium. Liquidations $482K against a thin 7d p75 of $176K reads heavy on relative terms. Top-trader L/S 1.34 down 0.39 over 7 days holds the smart-money-fade read. Cross-feed disagreement persists — today's token-call third run rotated to GENIUS HIGH 9/10 LONG on the Binance listing catalyst against this SHORT watchlist.

watchlist.trigger: another -5% day with OI extending lower fires CAPITULATION on the Tier 2 -10% drawdown gate
watchlist.thesis: BCH carries the heaviest smart-money exit in today's universe — top-trader L/S 1.18 down 1.44 over 7 days, the entire long-side conviction has rolled off. Multi-day bleed -17.16% over 7 days on OI -10.20% 7d means no leverage rebuild on the way down. Funding -0.0281%/8h with basis +0.174% reads as spot premium against a shorted future — an arb shape rather than directional positioning. Pct_4h -4.80% means the move is still extending. Late-entry shape but the cascade has not exhausted.

evaluations.note: Third intra-day run. NEAR ticked $2.058 → $2.074 since the morning eval, still above the $2.05 invalidation by 1.17%. AI agents + DePIN both 5/5 RIDE held the narrative leg through the day. OI -3.99% 24h continues the without-panic unwind.

Third intra-day run. HYPE +0.68% from yesterday's $55.107 close to $55.482, holding $1.48 above the revised $54 buyback floor. AIXBT grounding finally refreshed — narrative shifts from $1.8M daily buybacks to HIP-4 prediction markets going live, institutional adoption story extending. Smart-money L/S 1.34 holds +0.13 over 7d.

Day 1 RIDE. ZEC bounced +1.97% intraday to $594.07 but holds $25.93 below the $620 invalidation. Funding flipped positive to +0.0072%/8h from a 7d average -0.0041% — longs paying premium into the bounce, classic trap shape. AIXBT still names ZEC alone in privacy-coin strength (XMR dropped from the lead), narrative leg intact.

add_watchlist.trigger: another -5% day with OI extending lower fires CAPITULATION on the Tier 2 -10% drawdown gate
add_watchlist.thesis: Heaviest smart-money exit in today's universe — top L/S 1.18 down 1.44 over 7d. -17.16% 7d on OI -10.20% 7d, no leverage rebuild on the bleed. Funding -0.0281% with basis +0.174% reads as spot/futures arb, not directional positioning. Pct_4h -4.80% means move still extending.
named_risks: Late entry — cascade may exhaust before CAP fires
Spot/futures basis +0.174% reads as arb dampening directional conviction
